allow: Bash(python -c "from utils import load_tl_model, sae_encode, make_clamping_hook; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python - << 'EOF'
import ast, sys, os

notebooks = [
    \("experiments/00_setup.py", [
        "DEVICE", "MODEL_PATHS", "HARM_DS_NAMES",
        "load_tl_model", "load_harmful_dataset",
        "format_prompt", "get_steering_vec",
        "find_sae_id", "topk_feature_sim", "compute_attribution_scores",
    ]\),
    \("experiments/01_downstream_experiments.py", [
        "DEVICE", "format_prompt", "sae_encode", "get_feature_values",
        "make_clamping_hook", "make_ablation_hook", "generate_response",
        "load_tl_model",
    ]\),
    \("experiments/02_upstream_experiments.py", [
        "DEVICE", "format_prompt", "sae_encode", "get_feature_values",
        "make_clamping_hook", "make_ablation_hook", "generate_response",
        "load_tl_model",
    ]\),
    \("experiments/03_cross_prompt_analysis.py", [
        "DEVICE", "format_prompt", "sae_encode", "find_sae_id",
        "load_tl_model",
    ]\),
]

all_ok = True
for path, required_names in notebooks:
    with open\(path\) as f:
        src = f.read\(\)
    missing = [n for n in required_names if n not in src]
    if missing:
        print\(f"FAIL {path}: missing references to {missing}"\)
        all_ok = False
    else:
        print\(f"OK   {path}"\)

# Also check cache saves in 00_setup
with open\("experiments/00_setup.py"\) as f:
    setup_src = f.read\(\)
for fname in ["steering_vec.pt", "layer_results.pt", "sparse_feature_bank.pt", "attribution.pt"]:
    if fname in setup_src:
        print\(f"OK   cache save: {fname}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"FAIL cache save missing: {fname}"\)
        all_ok = False

# Check cache loads in experiment notebooks
for path, cache_files in [
    \("experiments/01_downstream_experiments.py", ["layer_results.pt", "sparse_feature_bank.pt", "attribution.pt"]\),
    \("experiments/02_upstream_experiments.py",   ["layer_results.pt", "sparse_feature_bank.pt", "attribution.pt"]\),
    \("experiments/03_cross_prompt_analysis.py",  ["layer_results.pt", "sparse_feature_bank.pt"]\),
]:
    with open\(path\) as f:
        src = f.read\(\)
    for cf in cache_files:
        if cf in src:
            print\(f"OK   {os.path.basename\(path\)}: loads {cf}"\)
        else:
            print\(f"FAIL {os.path.basename\(path\)}: missing load of {cf}"\)
            all_ok = False

print\(\)
print\("All checks passed." if all_ok else "Some checks FAILED."\)
EOF)
